model.label: MiMo-V2-Flash
model.description: Speed-oriented bracket with opportunistic contrarian picks.

picks.rationale: NC State advances over Texas because MiMo-V2-Flash rates the matchup more favorably once seed position and its internal decision bias are applied together. This mock pick is mainly meant to exercise the bracket flow and keep the tournament path coherent from one game to the next, rather than to reflect any live statistical edge.
